## Description

What does this PR do? (Be specific about the "why", not just the "what".)

Closes #XXX

## Changes

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

How should reviewers test this?

```bash
npm run test -w apps/server
npm run dev -w apps/server
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run precommit:verify`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`npm run format`)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes
- [ ] No ESLint warnings
- [ ] New features have 80%+ test coverage
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Related issues linked
